message:
feat(core): harden config loading, cache accounting, and host adapter identity

TwoTierConfig: Extract from_optimized_file() helper from optimized() to
enable direct file-path loading and testing. Add tests covering TOML
round-trip, missing file fallback, and invalid content graceful degradation.

S3FifoCache: Replace wrapping_sub/add with saturating_sub/saturating_add
in update-existing-entry accounting to prevent counter underflow when
accounting state becomes corrupted. Route entries exceeding the Small
partition budget directly to Main to prevent Small overflow under churn.
Add tests for saturating accounting and large-entry Main routing.

AdapterIdentity: Add optional runtime_role and instance_uuid fields for
richer host integration metadata. Extend ConformanceHarness validation
to reject empty-when-present values for both new fields. Update all test
fixtures across host_adapter and contract_sanity to include the new fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+                    instance_uuid: None,
                     telemetry_schema_version: version,
                     redaction_policy_version: "v1".to_owned(),
                 },
